hero.headline: Digital Auto Service:
hero.subheadline: Stop managing with notebooks, Telegram, and Excel. Customers, vehicles, orders, and parts — all in one system, from any device.

timeline.title: Vehicle History
timeline.subtitle: Complete service history for every vehicle — in one place

features.title: All Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to run your auto service
features.customers_desc: Store all customers and vehicles in one database. Fast search, complete history.
features.orders_desc: Assign tasks to mechanics, track progress, and analyze KPI metrics.
features.inventory_desc: Barcode scanning, low-stock alerts, automated reporting.
features.reports_desc: Daily, weekly, and monthly revenue analytics. Export and print.
features.wash_desc: Monitor wash bays in real time. Booking and status management.

pricing.title: Pricing Plans
pricing.subtitle: Choose the right plan for your business

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What happens after the 14-day trial ends?
faq.a1: After the trial, you'll be switched to your chosen plan. If you cancel, your data is kept for 30 days.
faq.q2: Does the system work without internet?
faq.a2: Core features (adding customers, creating orders) work offline. Data syncs when the connection is restored.
faq.a3: Yes, all data is protected with SSL encryption. Daily backups are taken automatically.
faq.q4: Can I use it across multiple branches?
faq.a4: The Enterprise plan supports multiple branches and data sharing between them.
faq.a5: No installation needed — it runs in the browser. You can start within 5 minutes of signing up.

footer.description: Move your auto service business to a digital system. Fast, convenient, and reliable.
